texts: Added a popularity poll for the end of season 7.
Swapped out the APR 2026 page link on the homepage to the popularity poll. The APR 2026 page will be made available in the archive page in a future update.
Changed builds and md plans to use the customized border color instead of the previous fixed bronze color.
Changed team builds to display the last icon instead of '+1' if only one icon remained.
Changed quoted comments when replying to show a collapsed version instead. Clicking on 'See More' will display the full comment.
